summary: Trustpilot review sync feature fully tested. Fixed critical backend route ordering bug. All 12 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI elements verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug in /app/backend/routes/reviews.py - Trustpilot routes (trustpilot-config, trustpilot-reviews) were defined AFTER {review_id} routes, causing path conflicts. Moved static path routes before dynamic {review_id} routes.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Trustpilot sync data (20 reviews from gameshopnepal.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trustpilot sync feature fully working. Backend routes fixed for proper path matching. 20 reviews synced from gameshopnepal.com domain.

backend_apis.GET /api/reviews/trustpilot-config: PASS - Returns domain, last_sync, count with admin auth
backend_apis.PUT /api/reviews/trustpilot-config: PASS - Updates domain with admin auth, rejects empty domain
backend_apis.POST /api/reviews/sync-trustpilot: PASS - Syncs reviews from Trustpilot, returns synced_count

frontend_ui.stats_cards: PASS - Shows review count (20), avg rating (4.5), last sync time
frontend_ui.settings_panel: PASS - Opens with domain input, save button works
frontend_ui.sync_button: PASS - Triggers sync, shows success toast
frontend_ui.reviews_list: PASS - Displays all synced reviews with ratings, dates, Trustpilot badge
frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: PASS - Trustpilot link appears under Store group

bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - dynamic {review_id} routes were defined before static trustpilot-config and trustpilot-reviews routes, causing path conflicts
bug_fixed.fix: Moved Trustpilot routes (lines 243-277) before {review_id} routes (lines 284-295) in /app/backend/routes/reviews.py
